metadata.title: Australian Federal MPs LGBTIQ+ Voting Records
metadata.description: Comprehensive voting records on LGBTIQ+ issues for all 151 federal electoral divisions

methodology.description: Alignment scores calculated from recorded parliamentary votes on LGBTIQ+ related legislation
methodology.calculation: (Pro-LGBTIQ+ votes / Total tracked votes) × Base party score adjustment

metadata.disclaimer: This tool presents objective voting records from Parliament. We do not endorse any politician or party. Use this data to make informed decisions about who represents you.

bills_tracked.name: Marriage Amendment (Definition and Religious Freedoms) Act 2017
Religious Discrimination Bill 2021
bills_tracked.description: Withdrawn after amendments to protect LGBTIQ+ students. Bill would have allowed religious discrimination.

bills_tracked.name: Petition to Ban Conversion Practices
bills_tracked.description: Petition calling for federal ban on conversion practices

bills_tracked.name: Sex Discrimination Amendment (Sexual Orientation, Gender Identity and Intersex Status) Act 2013
bills_tracked.description: Extended anti-discrimination protections to LGBTIQ+ Australians

bills_tracked.name: Sex Discrimination Amendment (Sexual Orientation, Gender Identity and Intersex Status) Bill 2022
bills_tracked.description: Strengthened protections against discrimination based on sexual orientation, gender identity, and intersex status

bills_tracked.name: Births, Deaths and Marriages Registration Amendment
bills_tracked.description: Simplifying gender marker changes on official documents
